stat.title: Pinch-Hit Chaos
stat.subtitle: Pinch appearances ending in hit, HBP, HR, or K.

notableEvents.label: Randal Grichuk pinch-hit · Strikeout
notableEvents.detail: Randal Grichuk strikes out swinging.

notableEvents.label: Matt Vierling pinch-hit · Strikeout
notableEvents.detail: Matt Vierling called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Ryan Kreidler pinch-hit · Lineout
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Kreidler lines out sharply to left fielder Steven Kwan.

notableEvents.detail: Tyrone Taylor strikes out swinging.

notableEvents.detail: Max Muncy strikes out swinging.

notableEvents.detail: Jared Triolo strikes out swinging.

notableEvents.label: Gavin Sheets pinch-hit · Flyout
notableEvents.detail: Gavin Sheets flies out to left fielder Mauricio Dubón.

notableEvents.label: Daniel Susac pinch-hit · Groundout
notableEvents.detail: Daniel Susac grounds out, third baseman Nick Loftin to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino.

notableEvents.label: Ben Williamson pinch-hit · Walk
notableEvents.detail: Ben Williamson walks. Cedric Mullins scores. Victor Mesa Jr. to 3rd. Taylor Walls to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Dane Myers pinch-hit · Fielders Choice Out
notableEvents.detail: Dane Myers reaches on a fielder's choice out, shortstop Colt Emerson to catcher Cal Raleigh. Elly De La Cruz out at home.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Rojas pinch-hit · Pop Out
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Rojas pops out to first baseman Bryce Harper in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Leo Jiménez pinch-hit · Lineout
notableEvents.detail: Leo Jiménez lines out to right fielder Cam Smith.

notableEvents.label: Trevor Larnach pinch-hit · Single
notableEvents.detail: Trevor Larnach singles on a line drive to center fielder Petey Halpin. Luke Keaschall to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Jeff McNeil pinch-hit · Flyout
notableEvents.detail: Jeff McNeil flies out to left fielder Max Kepler.

notableEvents.label: José Fermín pinch-hit · Groundout
notableEvents.detail: José Fermín grounds out, shortstop Zach Neto to first baseman Nolan Schanuel.

notableEvents.label: Andrés Chaparro pinch-hit · Flyout
notableEvents.detail: Andrés Chaparro flies out to right fielder Troy Johnston.

notableEvents.label: Dylan Beavers pinch-hit · Strikeout
notableEvents.detail: Connor Wong challenged (pitch result), call on the field was overturned: Dylan Beavers called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Randal Grichuk pinch-hit · Strikeout
notableEvents.detail: Randal Grichuk strikes out swinging.

notableEvents.label: Hao-Yu Lee pinch-hit · Single
notableEvents.detail: Hao-Yu Lee singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Ian Happ. Kevin McGonigle to 3rd. Gleyber Torres to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Max Muncy pinch-hit · Double
notableEvents.detail: Max Muncy doubles (16) on a line drive to right fielder Gabriel Rincones Jr. Miguel Rojas scores. Teoscar Hernández to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Leo Jiménez pinch-hit · Single
notableEvents.detail: Leo Jiménez singles on a line drive to left fielder Zach Dezenzo.

notableEvents.label: Austin Martin pinch-hit · Grounded Into DP
notableEvents.detail: Austin Martin grounds into a double play, second baseman Travis Bazzana to first baseman Kyle Manzardo. Trevor Larnach out at 2nd. Austin Martin out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jeff McNeil pinch-hit · Single
notableEvents.detail: Jeff McNeil singles on a line drive to center fielder Tim Tawa. Shea Langeliers scores. Lawrence Butler scores. Tommy White to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Jacob Gonzalez pinch-hit · Lineout
notableEvents.detail: Jacob Gonzalez lines out to right fielder Jasson Domínguez.

notableEvents.label: Luis Rengifo pinch-hit · Single
notableEvents.detail: Luis Rengifo singles on a sharp ground ball to right fielder Eli White.
